title: MikroTik RouterBOARD E62iUGS-2axD5axT, hAP ax S
description: The MikroTik hAP ax S is a high-performance dual-band Wi-Fi 6 routerboard offering real-world throughput of around 800-900Mbps , enabled by its triple-chain 5GHz radio . The device features (5) 1Gbit ports (1x PoE-In, 1x PoE-Out), (1) 2.5G SFP slot and (1) USB port . Thanks to its high performance and low latency, it is also an excellent AP for VR streaming for PCVR headsets (5) 1Gbit ports (1x passive PoE-In, 1x passive PoE-Out) and (1) 2.5G SFP slot Total wireless throughput up to 2.37Gbps - 574Mbps at 2.4GHz (2x2) and 1800Mbps at 5GHz (3x3) RouterOS v7 L4 provides full control - no subscriptions and no locked features Passive cooling - silent operation, suitable for office environments Powering - passive PoE (18-28VDC), or DC connector (12-28VDC) Device Power adapter 24V/1.5A
specsSearch: Wireless features Sensitivity [dBm] 100 Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ax, 802.11a Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 1800 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 574 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 24 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 23 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 3 x 3 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 5 Antenna gain [dBi] 5,5, 8 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (5) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (1) 1G/2.5Gbps USB Yes Power Power over Ethernet 18 .. 28V DC Power type PoE, DC connector PoE type PoE-Out + PoE-In PoE Out ports 1 Max. power consumption [W] 34 Power via connector/terminal 12 .. 28V DC Physical characteristics Design On the wall, Desktop Purpose Indoor Fans No Chassis design Plastic Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 156 Height [mm] 36 Depth [mm] 127 Hardware CPU EN7562CT CPU frequency [MHz] 950 CPU cores 2 Internal storage [MB] 128 RAM [MB] 512
